name: Matcha Anda
original_name: มัจฉาอันดา
overview: A love story between a human and a mermaid. This drama follows how a human Khun Naraen and the mermaid princess of the North ocean, Anda, fell in love, while Anda continue to stay away from the clutches of Sinthu, the mermaid king of the South ocean.

trailers.title: [MV] เพลงรักแท้ - Mewsic (RoseSound) ost. มัจฉาอันดา
